description: You are a Business Continuity Planner at a mid-size financial services firm. Create a formal Ransomware Incident Response process diagram in Wondershare EdrawMax using a cross-functional swimlane layout. Map the firm's response from initial threat detection through containment, eradication, recovery, and post-incident review, including distinct lanes for IT Security, Executive Management, and Legal/Compliance. The diagram must incorporate decision points, action steps, and directional connectors. The document must contain two pages: Page 1 featuring the swimlane flowchart with a professional color theme, and Page 2 featuring an Executive Summary or Incident Impact Assessment addressing incident scope, affected systems, recovery time objective (RTO), and key lessons learned. Save the completed diagram to /home/ga/ransomware_ir_flowchart.eddx
